issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderIsName' to check if Leader is [Buggy], not 'HasCardOnBoard' which checks for a card on the board
Missing 'leaderName' field required by 'LeaderIsName' condition type
TrashFromHand action has unnecessary 'thenActions' field; this is a simple discard action without conditional chaining

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have 2 or more Characters with a base cost of 5 or more, this Character gains +1 cost. [On Play] If your Leader is [Buggy], draw 3 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand.
